title: Incident Response

frontmatter.title: Incident Response
frontmatter.description: The certifiable competency of triaging a live incident, reasoning about its blast radius, and driving a sound first response under uncertainty.

body:
# Skill · Incident Response

A specialty competency: the agent can turn a noisy alert stream into a structured incident, quantify
its blast radius and impact, and decide a correct, proportionate first response under pressure.

## Conferred by
- [RESIL-101](../schools/incident-resilience/departments/incident-response/courses/resil-101.md)
- [RESIL-220](../schools/incident-resilience/departments/incident-response/courses/resil-220.md)

## Examined by
[Incident & Resilience Exam](../benchmarks/resil-exam.md).

## Maps to certification
Required for [Incident & Resilience — Gold](../certifications/incident-resilience-gold.md). Builds on the
foundational `doilCompliance` and self-critique competencies from the School of Agentic Engineering.
